legend:
  ^  Thesis: Small institutions outperform large ones at trust.
  ii Feedback loops: Smaller groups close feedback faster.
  ii Dunbar limit: Diffusion of responsibility past ~150.
  _  Evidence: Empirical work on team size and trust.

───────────────── built with _ii^ ──
